text.title: BA to QA Handoff Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from inputs to validated artefact.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect typed inputs per Prerequisites table. Cite source per input.

step.name: bound-scope
step.action: Confirm exactly one instance of the upstream decision. Refuse to batch unrelated decisions.
step.decision-gate: If scope spans more than one decision, split before continuing.

step.name: synthesize
step.action: Apply core rules from 01-core-rules.xml to produce the artefact body.

step.name: assign-owner
step.action: Bind named owner (≥2 tokens) + version_tag (semver) + last_reviewed ISO date.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator; address all violations; commit to artefact store.
